title: bromus benekenii
intro: Bromus benekenii, also known as Beneken's Brome or False Brome, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bromus benekenii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Bromus benekenii typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots and leaves, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves.
